//: Team-memory Tailscale ACL — paste into the Tailscale admin console (Access Controls tab).
Implements ADR-0005: Tailscale tailnet as the network gate.
Adjust 'group:team-memory-users' membership to your team's email list.
The host running deploy/team-memory/docker-compose.yml must be tagged 'tag:memory-host'.

acls.//: Default-deny: members of team-memory-users may only reach the brain on TCP 7078.
Admins keep SSH access to the brain host (Tailscale SSH; no key distribution needed).

ssh.//: Tailscale SSH for maintenance — admins to root on tagged hosts. Auth via Tailscale identity.

tests.//: Regression test: a normal team-memory user must reach 7078 but not SSH.
Regression test: an outsider (no group) must be denied entirely.
